provider.hero_sub: Join Chirala's fastest-growing local service network and get access to hundreds of customers looking for your expertise.
provider.f1_text: Get daily bookings and increase your monthly earnings significantly without marketing costs.
provider.f2_text: Be your own boss. Accept bookings when you want and work according to your own schedule.
provider.f3_text: We verify all customers and provide dedicated support so you can work safely and securely.

serviceDetails.step_2: Verified professional arrives at your doorstep
serviceDetails.seo_desc_2: services in Chirala are designed to provide reliable, high-quality, and stress-free experiences for your home or business. Whether you need immediate assistance or scheduled maintenance, our verified local professionals are equipped with the best tools to deliver exceptional results. Experience the convenience of professional service tailored specifically to the needs of the Chirala community.

about.title: About Us
about.desc: Learn about Chirala Allround Services, our mission, and our focus on providing reliable local services in Chirala.
about.s1_text: Chirala Allround Services is a premier local service marketplace designed to connect the residents of Chirala with highly skilled, verified professionals. From routine home maintenance to personal care and event management, we bring expert services directly to your doorstep.
about.s2_text: Our mission is to simplify everyday living by providing accessible, high-quality, and affordable services. We aim to empower local professionals by giving them a platform to showcase their skills, while ensuring customers receive unparalleled convenience and satisfaction.
about.s3_text: We are deeply rooted in the Chirala community. By focusing exclusively on local needs, we can provide faster response times, understand regional nuances, and foster a stronger local economy. We are built for Chirala, by Chirala.
about.s4_text: Your safety and satisfaction are our top priorities. Every professional on our platform undergoes a strict verification process. We ensure transparent pricing, secure bookings, and dedicated support so you can book with complete peace of mind.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.desc: Learn how Chirala Allround Services collects, uses, and protects your personal data.
privacy.s1_text: We collect personal information necessary to provide our services. This includes your name, phone number, and service address. When you book a service, we may also collect specific details regarding the service location or requirements to ensure the professional can adequately prepare.
privacy.s2_text: The data we collect is strictly used to facilitate the booking process, coordinate with service professionals, and improve our platform's user experience. Your contact details are shared only with the assigned professional to ensure timely and accurate service delivery.
privacy.s3_text: We may use trusted third-party services, such as secure payment gateways, to process transactions. These third parties have their own strict privacy policies and only access the minimum data required to complete the transaction. We do not sell or rent your personal information to marketers or unauthorized third parties.
privacy.s4_text: By using Chirala Allround Services, you consent to our collection and use of your data as described in this Privacy Policy. We regularly review our policies to ensure compliance with data protection standards. If you have any concerns regarding your data, please contact our support team.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.desc: Read the terms and conditions for using Chirala Allround Services platform.
terms.s1_text: When you book a service through our platform, you agree to provide accurate location and contact details. The estimated time of arrival is subject to professional availability and local traffic conditions. We request that an adult be present at the premises during the delivery of the service.
terms.s2_text: Payments for services must be completed as per the agreed method (online or cash-on-delivery). For certain high-value services, a partial advance payment may be required. Final billing may include additional costs for spare parts or extended labor, which will be communicated by the professional beforehand.
terms.s3_text: You may cancel or reschedule a booking free of charge up to 2 hours before the scheduled time. Late cancellations or repeated no-shows may incur a nominal cancellation fee or temporary suspension of your account to ensure fairness to our professionals.
terms.s4_text: Chirala Allround Services acts as a technology platform connecting users with independent service professionals. While we thoroughly verify our professionals, we are not directly liable for any damages, losses, or disputes arising during the service delivery. However, we are committed to mediating and resolving any issues to the best of our ability.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.desc: Get in touch with Chirala Allround Services for support, feedback, or business inquiries.

footer.tagline: Professional Solutions for Home, Personal & Events

help.title: Help & FAQ
help.desc: Find answers to common questions about booking services, payments, and cancellations.
help.q1: How does the booking process work?
help.a1: Simply browse or search for a service, select a preferred date and time slot, and enter your address details. Once you submit, your booking is confirmed and assigned to a verified local professional who will arrive at your doorstep at the scheduled time.
help.q2: Can I cancel or reschedule my booking?
help.a2: Yes, you can cancel or reschedule your booking free of charge up to 2 hours before the scheduled service time. You can manage your bookings directly from the "My Bookings" section in your dashboard.
help.q3: How do I pay for the service?
help.a3: You can pay securely online through our platform using UPI, credit/debit cards, or net banking. Alternatively, you can choose to pay the professional directly in cash after the service is completed to your satisfaction.
help.q4: What if I am not satisfied with the service?
help.a4: Customer satisfaction is our priority. If you face any issues, please reach out to our support team within 24 hours of service completion, and we will arrange a rework or provide a suitable resolution.
help.support_text: Our support team is available from Monday to Saturday, 9 AM to 8 PM.
